researched_category.value: Cloud-based Phone System / Call Center Software
researched_category.notes: Aircall is a cloud-based business phone system and call center platform providing REST APIs and webhooks to access calls, contacts, users, numbers, and related resources.

one_liner.value: Cloud-based business phone system and call center platform with AI-powered call management, analytics, messaging, and 250+ integrations.
one_liner.notes: Aircall positions itself as an AI-powered customer communications platform.

methods.notes: Aircall supports OAuth2 (for Technology Partners building multi-tenant marketplace apps) and Basic Auth using api_id as username and api_token as password (for customers building for their own account). The Basic Auth api_id/api_token functions effectively like an API key pair.

access.notes: API access is included in the Essentials plan ($30/license/month with 3-license minimum = $90/month minimum). There is no free plan; a 7-day free trial is available. API keys (api_id + api_token) can be generated from the Aircall Dashboard by any admin without additional approval. OAuth credentials for multi-tenant apps require a partner application form and Aircall review.

summary.value: Aircall has a comprehensive Public REST API (https://api.aircall.io/v1) covering Users (V1 & V2), Teams, Calls (list, search, transfer, comment, tag, archive), Numbers, Contacts, Tags, Webhooks, Messages (SMS/WhatsApp high-volume and agent conversation), Analytics, AI Voice Agent, Conversation Intelligence (transcripts, sentiments, summaries, action items), Dialer Campaigns, and IVR Options. Webhooks provide real-time events for user, call, number, message, contact, integration, conversation intelligence, analytics, and AI voice agent events. Rate limit is 120 requests/minute per company.
summary.notes: The API is well-documented with tutorials and reference docs on developer.aircall.io. JavaScript SPA site requires some exploration but docs are comprehensive.

agent_interface.notes: A community MCP server exists (@allo/aircall-mcp-server, 73 tools) built by Allo (not official). Zapier MCP, Pipedream MCP, and viaSocket MCP also provide Aircall agent integrations. No official Aircall MCP server was found. No Composio toolkit was found for Aircall.

rationale.value: Aircall has a well-documented, broad REST API that is technically suitable for building an agent toolkit. A community MCP server already exists with 73 tools. The main blocker is that API access requires a paid Aircall plan (Essentials at $30/license/month, minimum 3 licenses = $90/month). A free trial exists but is time-limited (7 days). For a developer with an active Aircall subscription, credentials can be self-served from the Dashboard via Basic Auth (api_id + api_token) without any approval process. For multi-tenant agent toolkits using OAuth, partner application and Aircall review are required, adding friction.
rationale.notes: The core technical barrier is the paid plan requirement, not the API itself. The API is public, well-documented, and broad enough for agent toolkits.

s1.quote: Aircall Public API is a classic REST API. It can be used with any programming languages and offers a fast, reliable and secure access to an Aircall account information. The root endpoint of Aircall Public API is https://api.aircall.io/v1.
s1.title: API References | Aircall

s2.quote: With Aircall Public API, Authentication can be done through OAuth or Basic Auth. If you want to build an App for companies using Aircall - this is mainly the case for Technology Partners - please use the OAuth flow. If you are an Aircall customer, building for your own Aircall account only, the Basic Auth flow will do the trick.
s2.title: API References - Authentication | Aircall

s3.quote: Those username and password credentials are called api_id and api_token in the Aircall Dashboard. You can create some in your Company's Settings page. In the API Keys section, click on Add a new API key.
s3.title: Basic Authentication | Aircall

s4.quote: Aircall limits the number of requests to its Public API to 120 requests per minute per company. The following headers are available in API headers' responses when the rate limit has been reached
s4.title: API References - Rate limiting | Aircall

s5.quote: Essentials — A flexible voice solution that's easy to set up, integrate and manage. /license. 250+ integrations and API access. 3 licenses for null/month, billed annually.
s5.title: Aircall Pricing & Plans

s6.quote: Aircall pricing follows a license-based model: Essentials is $30/license, Professional is $50/license, and Custom is quote-based. These rates apply to annual billing. A minimum of 3 licenses is required for the Essentials and Professional plan and 25 for the Custom plan.
s6.title: Aircall Plans & Pricing: Full Guide for 2026

s7.quote: Aircall: AI-Powered Customer Communications Platform for ... Customer communications, evolved with AI that handles customer interactions, end to end.
s7.title: Aircall: AI-Powered Customer Communications Platform

s8.quote: MCP Server for Aircall API — 73 tools for calls, contacts, SMS, users, teams, transcripts, AI summaries, and more. This MCP server is NOT built, maintained, or endorsed by Aircall.
s8.title: themobilefirstco/aircall-mcp-server

s9.quote: Use AircallMCP to take action in your AI tools. Zapier AircallMCP lets you connect Aircall's actions with any AI tool that supports MCP.
s9.title: Aircall MCP Server - MCP AI | Zapier

s10.quote: Aircall MCP Server. Call center software for customer-centric teams.
s10.title: Aircall MCP Server | Pipedream

limitations: The developer.aircall.io site is a JavaScript SPA; the static HTML fetch did not capture the full content of some sections (e.g., rate limiting details, full endpoint descriptions). However, sufficient data was captured via search result snippets that included the verbatim content.
Rate limit information was confirmed via search result snippet showing the official docs content and the changelog entry about updating from 60 to 120 requests/min.
Free trial API access is not explicitly confirmed but implied since the trial provides access to the Essentials plan features which include API access.
